response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: The audio phonetically matches the reference lyrics perfectly. 2. JSON Usage: Fully utilized the lyrics from the reference JSON to match the audio. 3. Timing & Pacing: Subtitles are tightly synced to the vocal beats of both 'Grateful Days' and 'Lupin the Fire'. Visual text subtitles were added for on-screen title cards ('Lupin the Third' and 'Lupin the Fire').

subtitles.english: Darling, my darling

subtitles.original: Yeah! Yeah! Yo!
subtitles.english: Yeah! Yeah! Yo!

subtitles.original: 俺は東京生まれ HIP HOP 育ち
subtitles.english: I was born in Tokyo, raised on hip hop

subtitles.original: 悪そうなやつは大体友達
subtitles.english: Most guys who look bad are my friends

subtitles.original: 悪そうなやつとだいたい同じ
subtitles.english: Pretty much the same as those bad guys

subtitles.original: 裏の道歩き見てきたこの街
subtitles.english: Walking the back streets, I've seen this town

subtitles.original: 渋谷 六本木 そう思春期も早々に
subtitles.english: Shibuya, Roppongi, yeah, early in my adolescence

subtitles.original: これにぞっこんに
subtitles.english: I fell head over heels for this

subtitles.original: カバンなら置き放してきた高校に
subtitles.english: I left my school bag behind at high school

subtitles.original: マジ親に迷惑かけた本当に
subtitles.english: For real, I caused a lot of trouble for my parents, truly

subtitles.original: だが時は経ち 今じゃ雑誌のカバー
subtitles.english: But time has passed, and now I'm on magazine covers

subtitles.original: そこらじゅうで幅きかす DON DADA
subtitles.english: Dominating everywhere like a don dada

subtitles.original: マイク掴んだらマジで No.1
subtitles.english: When I grab the mic, I'm truly number one

subtitles.original: 東京代表 トップランカーだ
subtitles.english: The top ranker representing Tokyo

subtitles.original: そうこの地 この国に生を授かり
subtitles.english: Yeah, being blessed with life in this place, in this country

subtitles.original: Jahに無敵のマイク預かり
subtitles.english: Entrusted with an invincible mic by Jah

subtitles.original: 仲間たち 親たち ファンたちに今日も
subtitles.english: To my friends, my parents, and my fans today too

subtitles.original: 感謝して進む 荒れたオフロード
subtitles.english: With gratitude I advance along this rugged off-road path

subtitles.original: I got sound, I got feel, I got beautiful days
subtitles.english: I got sound, I got feel, I got beautiful days

subtitles.original: 日出ずる国に僕ら生まれ育ち
subtitles.english: We were born and raised in the land of the rising sun

subtitles.original: 今こうして踏みしめる大地
subtitles.english: And now we stand firmly on this ground

subtitles.original: 常に開く新しい Page
subtitles.english: Always opening a new page

subtitles.original: 旅に出よう それぞれの Stage
subtitles.english: Let's embark on a journey, each to our own stage

subtitles.english: Here we write our joy and gratitude

subtitles.original: 共に奏でる真の理解者
subtitles.english: Our true understanders with whom we play together

subtitles.original: つつみ隠さず時代を描写
subtitles.english: Portraying the era without hiding a thing

subtitles.original: Pressure はねのけて乱反射
subtitles.english: Reflecting wildly, brushing off the pressure

subtitles.english: Our love that will never die out on any day

subtitles.english: The lily crest that blooms without ever withering

subtitles.english: Praising daily joys right here

subtitles.original: 日々ここにあるもの
subtitles.english: The things that are here day to day...

subtitles.original: この手に感じて
subtitles.english: ...I feel in my hands

subtitles.english: This level of ordeal isn't enough

subtitles.english: Listen! party people!

subtitles.english: I race through life at breakneck speed

subtitles.english: Just like skiing straight down

subtitles.english: I don't know how to live slowly

subtitles.english: You, watching that, are sexy
